summary: Iteration 45 - EchoStratus FP&A System (ProfitSword-level) Test PASSED. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend EchoStratus panel fully functional with all 10 views working: Executive, Budget, Forecast, What-If, CapEx ROI, Activations, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk. New FP&A features (Budget Builder, CapEx ROI, Activations) working correctly with real data from MongoDB.

issues: Horizon button 36m not visible in test (may be scrolled off or renamed) - 4/5 horizons tested successfully

critical_code_review_comments: EchoStratus frontend (1292 lines) is well-structured with clear component separation for all 10 views
Budget View: Full P&L grid with 12 months + Annual column, driver-based assumptions with sliders, variance tracking with favorable/unfavorable indicators
CapEx ROI View: Complete breakeven analysis with NPV, ROI, table size comparison (2/4/6/8/10 seats), cash flow chart
Activations View: 6 templates (pop-up, wine dinner, brunch, holiday, pool party, chef's table), per-event and annual projections, monthly revenue chart, spending patterns by outlet
All views have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API calls use window.location.origin for proper URL handling
IBM Plex fonts and Bloomberg Terminal dark aesthetic implemented correctly
Real data from MongoDB displayed with proper formatting (currency, percentages)
seed_data_creation: Test created: TEST_FY2026 Operating Budget via POST /api/echo-stratus/budget/create
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the new ProfitSword-level FP&A features in EchoStratus. All 10 navigation tabs work: Executive, Budget, Forecast, What-If (Scenarios), CapEx ROI, Activations, Signals, Actions (Recommendations), Portfolio, Risk. New API endpoints tested: POST /api/echo-stratus/budget/create (creates 12-month P&L), GET /api/echo-stratus/budget/list, GET /api/echo-stratus/budget/{id}, GET /api/echo-stratus/budget/{id}/variance (YTD variance with alerts), POST /api/echo-stratus/budget/update-assumptions (recalculates budget), POST /api/echo-stratus/capex/analyze (breakeven, NPV, ROI, table comparison), GET /api/echo-stratus/activations/templates (6 templates), POST /api/echo-stratus/activations/model (per-event and annual projections), GET /api/echo-stratus/patterns/spending (outlet spending patterns). Frontend panel accessible via sidebar 'EchoStratus' button.

backend_api_tests.budget_list: PASS - returns budgets array with count
backend_api_tests.budget_create: PASS - creates budget with 12 months, annual totals, assumptions
backend_api_tests.budget_get: PASS - returns full budget with monthly P&L detail
backend_api_tests.budget_variance: PASS - returns YTD variance with favorable/unfavorable status, pace tracking, alerts
backend_api_tests.budget_update_assumptions: PASS - recalculates budget with new growth/inflation/labor assumptions
backend_api_tests.capex_analyze_default: PASS - returns breakeven (months, covers), NPV, ROI, table size comparison (5 sizes), cash flows (7 years), recommendation
backend_api_tests.activations_templates: PASS - returns 6 templates (pop_up_dinner, wine_dinner, brunch_series, holiday_event, pool_party, chef_table)
backend_api_tests.activations_model_popup: PASS - returns per-event metrics, annual projections, monthly breakdown, historical benchmark
backend_api_tests.spending_patterns: PASS - returns overall metrics, by_outlet, by_event_type, seasonal patterns
backend_api_tests.scenarios_simulate: PASS - original endpoint still working with EBITDA impact

frontend_ui_tests.panel_loads: PASS - EchoStratus panel opens from sidebar
frontend_ui_tests.executive_view: PASS - KPI cards, 30-Day Projection, Cost Structure, AI Executive Summary render
frontend_ui_tests.budget_view: PASS - Monthly P&L grid, Variance panel, Assumptions panel with sliders, Apply button
frontend_ui_tests.capex_view: PASS - Input controls, Table size comparison (2/4/6/8/10 seats), Run Breakeven Analysis button, NPV/ROI/Decision display
frontend_ui_tests.activations_view: PASS - 6/6 templates visible, Activation result with per-event and annual metrics, Spending patterns by outlet
frontend_ui_tests.scenarios_view: PASS - 5 scenario templates, simulation runs with EBITDA impact display
frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASS - All 10 nav tabs work correctly

mocked_apis.note: All APIs return real data from MongoDB. AI narrative uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback.

budget_view.monthly_pnl_grid: 12 months + Annual column with Revenue, Cost of Sales, Labor, OpEx, EBITDA lines
budget_view.variance_panel: YTD comparison with favorable/unfavorable indicators, pace tracking (29.3% of pace)
budget_view.assumptions_panel: 8 sliders (revenue growth, food inflation, labor increase, occupancy target, check avg growth, event volume, new activations, capex budget)
budget_view.apply_recalculate: Button recalculates budget with new assumptions

capex_roi_view.input_controls: Item Name, Cost, Seats, Turns/Day, Avg Check, Useful Life, Food Cost %, Labor Cost %, Operating Days, Maintenance
capex_roi_view.table_comparison: 2/4/6/8/10 seat options with breakeven months, annual profit, daily revenue

activations_view.spending_patterns: Guest Spending Patterns by Outlet (Folio Analysis) with 6 outlets
